title: Haunters: The Art of the Scare
original_title: Haunters: The Art of the Scare
overview: A heart-warming and heart-stopping documentary about people who sacrifice everything to create the most popular and polarizing haunted houses for Halloween - from boo-scare mazes to a controversial new subculture of extreme terror experiences.
